channel.title: EngineeringPractices on More's awesome website
channel.description: Recent content in EngineeringPractices on More's awesome website

item.title: Practical LLM Training
item.author: morthan@qq.com (Morethan)
item.description:
Once you understand how a network architecture is implemented, a natural question arises: how do I actually train a model like this? This section compiles all sorts of engineering know-how that answers that very question.

Preface
#

Large model architectures come in all shapes and sizes, but if you really want to understand one, you have to get your hands dirty. There are plenty of high-quality online courses on YouTube to learn from— CS336: Language Modeling from Scratch being a prime example—so this article essentially serves as my notes on CS 336.
